message:
style: align struct field tags and normalize whitespace

- Run gofmt across all files with formatting inconsistencies
- Add explicit error drop markers for best-effort database operations
  (rows.Close, tx.Rollback) in state/schema.go per errcheck guidelines

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-		{0, 0},              // No restarts, no backoff
-		{1, 30 * time.Second}, // First restart: base

-		{3, 120 * time.Second}, // Third: base * 4
-		{4, 240 * time.Second}, // Fourth: base * 8
-		{5, 300 * time.Second}, // Fifth: capped at max (5m)
+		{0, 0},                  // No restarts, no backoff
+		{1, 30 * time.Second},   // First restart: base
+		{2, 60 * time.Second},   // Second: base * 2
+		{3, 120 * time.Second},  // Third: base * 4
+		{4, 240 * time.Second},  // Fourth: base * 8
+		{5, 300 * time.Second},  // Fifth: capped at max (5m)
 		{10, 300 * time.Second}, // Many: still capped
 	}
